name: MandateAgent — Mandate Execution Layer
description: Autonomous agent that executes within human-defined mandates with verifiable onchain compliance. Every action is checked against a bounded mandate, verified by a private reasoning engine (Venice AI), and receipted onchain. Self Protocol personhood verification is enforced at the contract level. The trust chain: receipt → mandate → Self proof → verified human.

services.description: MCP server for mandate-governed agent execution. Tools: check_compliance, execute_action, get_mandate, get_receipts, get_logs.

trustChain: receipt → mandate → Self proof → verified human
